field.name: help
field.p: Shift audits are created automatically when Close Shift or End of Day is triggered from the POS.

page.name: reconciliation
page.div: Matched — POS and system amounts agree.
Over — System collected more than POS reported.
Short — System collected less than POS reported.

div.div: Note: FirstPro does not send fuel sale data. Fuel is considered reconciled — system oil value is used as-is.

group.string: Staff breakdown is available in the Audit Lines below. Filter by line type to see deposits, withdrawals, and exchanges per staff.

field.name: notes
field.placeholder: General notes — e.g. reason for discrepancy, observations...

field.name: reconciliation_notes
field.placeholder: Reconciliation notes — e.g. approved by, corrective action...
